parameters.query:
WITH cli AS (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE tg_chat_id = $1::bigint),
     svc AS (SELECT id, duration_min FROM services WHERE code = $2 AND is_active=TRUE),
     ins AS (
       INSERT INTO bookings (client_id, service_id, starts_at, ends_at, status)
       SELECT cli.id, svc.id, $3::timestamptz, $3::timestamptz + (svc.duration_min || ' minutes')::interval, 'confirmed'
       FROM cli, svc
       RETURNING id, starts_at, ends_at
     )
SELECT id, starts_at, ends_at FROM ins;
